summary.intent: Resolve the final unresolved review thread on a PR for the NumberInput component in the ars-ui crate.
summary.outcome: Fixed SetProps to reclamp the current value when bounds/precision change, added 4 new tests, all 1988 tests pass and clippy is clean, committed and pushed (pass 5).

repo: NumberInput's SetProps handler must reclamp the stored value whenever bounds or precision are updated — this was not handled before this fix.
The project uses an 'xci-fast' step before committing/pushing as part of the standard PR workflow.
PR review is iterative with numbered passes; convergence was reached at pass 5 with 1 final P1 finding.

code.finding: SetProps must call the reclamp logic on the current value after updating min/max/precision fields to maintain invariants.

workflow: Review convergence tracking by counting unresolved threads directly via PR API is an effective signal for when a PR is ready to land.
Running the full test suite (1988 tests) plus clippy before each push ensures the bar for each round-trip is high.
